features: UNIQUE JADE GREEN STYLE and PREMIUM QUALITY Made A REAL Difference: Crafted from top-quality stainless steel, HANTEKAS Professional manicure set is sturdy and durable,offering flawless performance and a joyful use. What is more, the stylish and unique JADE GREEN combinations, which is first time to show on the market, gives it a glamorous look and make you outstanding from the crowd.

A TALORED 10 PCS MANICURE KIT: More than 15 years of dedication, HANTEKAS became a top notch brand for manicure pedicure tools and kits. This Professional Manicure Set Contains 10 pieces facial, nail and toenail tools that covers three major functions for hand care,facial care,foot care: finger and toenails Nail clippers Set, cuticle pusher cleaner, nail file, v-shaped push stick cuticle trimmers, eyebrow shaping tweezers, multi-purpose scissor, blackhead needle with loop remover and ear pick.

THE LUXURY AND FASHION: The luxury fashion case is made by grade pu material, pretty, sturdy and built to last. The JADE GREEN and white combinations is stylish and unique that make a real difference in tastes.

TRAVEL FRIENDLY AND USER FRIENDLY: Our Travel Grooming Nail kit is lightweight and perfect size in design, making it your perfect travel partner. You can put it in your bag and carry it wherever you go, ideal for travel and home use etc. It is easily opened/closed simply by a push of the button, and the case keeps all tools well organized, clean and secure all the time.

THE BEST GIFT: the High quality and Uniqueness, just like your love to your loved ones. Definitely a perfect gift for your relatives, friends, parents, husband and wife during Christmas Day, Valentine's Day, Mother’s Day, Father’s Day,back to school,Halloween, Thanksgiving day etc.
description: Product Description WHO IS HANTEKAS With more than 15 years of unshaken focus on consumer experience and details,HANTEKAS has become a first-rate brand dedicated itself to beauty&personal care fields.Our manicure set are made of high quality stainless steel/carbon steel tools, elegant and high quality leather, PU, fabric etc. All tools are polished, ground for sufficient times and elaborately treated to function well, comfortable,reliable and durable. Larger Nail Clipper: For trimming hard and thick toenails. Small Nail Clipper: For trimming finger nails. Diagonal Nail Clipper: For trimming the corner of nails. Dead Skin Fork: For removing callus, dead skin, etc Nail Cleaner: For cleaning dirt in nail. Nail File: For making nails smooth. Eyebrow Tweezers: For shaping up brows flawlessly by removing all unwanted eyebrow Ear Pick: For removing earwax from ear canal. Acne Needle: For removing blackhead or acne Eyebrow Scissors: For trimming eyebrow. HANTEKAS Manicure and pedicure tools set are made of high quality steel, which is strong and durable, and it is extremely hard and sharp. Designed for lifetime use. The Manicure set comes with case with a portable synthetic leather case keeping the nail art accessories and tools well organized, clean and secure all the time,! With such a lightweight and compact size, it is very comfortable to carry with your in your bags or even in your pocket everyday you like. Its is the Best Personal Manicure Pedicure Kit in Magnificent leather case, stylish and functional,great gift for families and friends, boy and girl,men and women, husband and wife, boyfriend and girl friend, brother and sister.
